name: Manifest Destiny
effect: Your Enter actions cost 0 AP. When you raze a location gain 2 VP.
text: Free Enter actions. Gain 2 VP when razing.

name: War Economy
effect: You gain 1 gold each time one of your units wins a contest.

name: Patronage
effect: Your Scientist units cost 1 less gold to deploy (minimum 1).

name: Feudalism
effect: Your Warrior units get +1 strength when at a location with one of your other units.

name: Mercantilism
effect: You gain 1 gold whenever you complete a mission.

name: Divine Right
effect: Your Spiritual units cannot be targeted by trap events.

name: Open Borders
effect: Your units treat one blocked edge as open when moving.
text: Ignore one blocked edge per move.
